title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs and embedders for chains, agents, RAG, and more.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) for chatting, model management, RAG, and multi-user workspaces; runs via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, asynchronous, and reactive APIs; Maven Central available.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: generate, chat, and embed with local models in Rails or plain Ruby scripts.

title: ollamaworks
summary: Community GitHub org collecting experimental tools: Ollama Discord bot, CLI helpers, model conversion scripts, and more.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI for chatting, managing models, and monitoring Ollama from the terminal; built with Node.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative with inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production-grade NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot (PyPI)
summary: Ready-to-run Streamlit chatbot that ingests PDFs/Web pages into Chroma and answers questions via any Ollama model.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose stacks for CPU, NVIDIA, and AMD GPU setups plus examples with Open-WebUI, Litellm-proxy, and more.

title: ollama-litellm
summary: LiteLLM provider shim letting you call Ollama models through the same interface as OpenAI, Anthropic, etc. (uniform keys, logging, proxy).

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that adds slash commands to chat with any local Ollama model and optionally moderate outputs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and WebUI on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s REST API; publish on crates.io.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# client for .NET 6+ with async streaming, dependency-injection helpers, and minimal API samples.

title: ollama-model-importer
summary: Official guide and helper scripts to import safetensors, GGUF, or PyTorch models into Ollama’s Modelfile format.

title: r/ollama - Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tips, new integrations, model recommendations, and troubleshooting Ollama setups.
